parsed.production_notes: The video exhibits clear signs of AI generation, including uncanny and slightly morphing faces, unnatural lip-sync that fails to match the audio, and stiff body language. Background details, such as the street outside the kitchen, show typical AI inconsistencies and artifacts.

characters.appearance: Asian female, 30s, medium build, light complexion. She has black wavy hair tied back.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt and a beige apron.
characters.demeanor: Cheerful but slightly stiff and unnatural.

characters.appearance: Asian male, 30s, medium build, light complexion. He has short black hair and wears glasses.
White humanoid robot face with glowing blue eyes and visible panel lines on its cheeks and forehead.

scenes.setting: Kitchen, daytime, cooking pot, soy sauce bottle, bright lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A woman and a man stand side-by-side in a brightly lit kitchen. The woman on the left holds a ladle in a pot on the stove. The man on the right holds a bottle of soy sauce. They are looking at each other and smiling. An open doorway behind them reveals a street with parked motorbikes.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a woman and a man cooking together in a kitchen. They are engaged in a conversation, smiling and gesturing. Text overlays appear on the screen highlighting parts of their dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Anh biết điều gì buồn cười không? Em học tiếng Anh mỗi ngày, nhưng em vẫn không thể giữ một cuộc hội thoại. [Do you know what's funny? I study English every day, but I still can't hold a conversation.]
Character B says: Chắc là em đang mắc ba lỗi này. [You're probably making these three mistakes.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Để tôi chỉ cho bạn sai lầm lớn nhất khi học tiếng Anh (Let me show you the biggest mistake when learning English)
ANH BIẾT ĐIỀU (DO YOU KNOW)
MỖI NGÀY, (EVERY DAY,)
HỘI THOẠI. (CONVERSATION.)
CHẮC LÀ EM ĐANG (YOU'RE PROBABLY)

scenes.setting: Various abstract settings, black and white filter.

panels.panel_visual_description: A black and white montage. First, a close-up of hands opening a leather wallet and pulling out a piece of paper. Second, a close-up of a man with curly hair looking down at a smartphone in his hands with a furrowed brow.

scenes.visual_description: A sequence of black and white clips illustrating mistakes. It shows hands opening a wallet, then a man looking frustrated at his phone. Large red 'X' marks appear over the wallet and the phone, along with text overlays describing the mistakes.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: Số một, học với sách giáo khoa. Số hai, trả tiền cho những khóa học siêu đắt. Số ba, dùng Google Translate cho mọi từ mới. [Number one, learning with textbooks. Number two, paying for super expensive courses. Number three, using Google Translate for every new word.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
HỌC VỚI SÁCH GIÁO KHOA. (LEARNING WITH TEXTBOOKS.)
TRẢ TIỀN CHO NHỮNG (PAYING FOR)
KHÓA HỌC SIÊU ĐẮT. (SUPER EXPENSIVE COURSES.)
SỐ BA, (NUMBER THREE,)
DÙNG GOOGLE TRANSLATE (USING GOOGLE TRANSLATE)
CHO MỌI TỪ MỚI. (FOR EVERY NEW WORD.)

scenes.setting: Kitchen, daytime, cooking pot, soy sauce bottle, bright lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A woman and a man stand in a kitchen. The woman holds a ladle in a pot. The man holds a soy sauce bottle in one hand and points directly at the camera with his other hand, smiling enthusiastically. The background shows an open doorway to a street.

scenes.visual_description: Back in the kitchen, the man enthusiastically recommends a solution, pointing at the camera. The woman continues to cook beside him. Text overlays emphasize his recommendation.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: Thay vào đó, hãy dùng Learna. Xem cái này đi. [Instead, use Learna. Watch this.]

scenes.setting: Split screen: abstract digital background top, kitchen bottom.

panels.panel_visual_description: A white humanoid robot face with glowing blue eyes and visible panel lines on its cheeks and forehead. It is set against a solid black background with white concentric circles radiating outwards from behind the robot's head.

A woman stands in a kitchen, looking directly forward. She holds a ladle in her right hand. Behind her is a white refrigerator, a window, and a counter with fresh herbs and limes. The lighting is bright and natural.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout showing an AI robot avatar on the top half and the woman in the kitchen on the bottom half. They appear to be having a back-and-forth conversation. Subtitles of their dialogue appear over the bottom panel.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character E says: Bạn biết nói tiếng Anh hông? [Do you know how to speak English?]
Character A says: Cũng tàm tạm à. [Just so-so.]
Character E says: Bạn đến từ đâu vậy? Where are you from? [Where are you from? Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am Vietnam. [I am Vietnam.]
Character E says: Gần đúng rồi! Nên nói là "I am from Vietnam." [Almost right! You should say "I am from Vietnam."]
Character A says: Trời ơi, tôi hay lộn vụ đó hoài à. [Oh my god, I always mess that up.]
Character E says: Không sao, tôi ở đây là để giúp bạn nói cho đúng nè. [It's okay, I'm here to help you say it right.]
Character A says: Nhưng mà... tôi đâu có tiền đâu. [But... I don't have any money.]
Character E says: Ủa? Không cần tiền đâu! Với Learna, bạn có thể luyện nói tiếng Anh miễn phí luôn. Không giống mấy app hay khoá học mắc tiền kia đâu. [Huh? No money needed! With Learna, you can practice speaking English for free. Not like those expensive apps or courses.]
Character A says: Thiệt hả? [Really?]
Character E says: Thiệt chớ! Không có chiêu trò gì hết. Chỉ là luyện nói tiếng Anh thật với thầy AI thôi. [Really! No tricks. Just practicing real English with an AI teacher.]
Character A says: Ý bạn là... như thầy thật luôn hả? [You mean... like a real teacher?]
Character E says: Đúng rồi! Nó sửa ngữ pháp, phát âm cho bạn và giúp bạn nói tự tin hơn nữa. [That's right! It corrects your grammar, pronunciation, and helps you speak more confidently.]
Character A says: Được rồi! Vậy tôi tải Learna liền luôn! [Alright! Then I'll download Learna right away!]
Character E says: Quá đã! Mình cùng nói tiếng Anh nha. [Awesome! Let's speak English together.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Bạn biết nói tiếng Anh hông? (Do you know how to speak English?)
Cũng tàm tạm à. (Just so-so.)
Bạn đến từ đâu vậy? Where are you from? (Where are you from? Where are you from?)
I am Vietnam. (I am Vietnam.)
Gần đúng rồi! Nên nói là "I am from Vietnam." (Almost right! You should say "I am from Vietnam.")
Trời ơi, tôi hay lộn vụ đó hoài à. (Oh my god, I always mess that up.)
Không sao, tôi ở đây là để giúp bạn nói cho đúng nè. (It's okay, I'm here to help you say it right.)
Nhưng mà... tôi đâu có tiền đâu. (But... I don't have any money.)
Ủa? Không cần tiền đâu! (Huh? No money needed!)
Với Learna, bạn có thể luyện nói tiếng Anh miễn phí luôn. (With Learna, you can practice speaking English for free.)
Không giống mấy app hay khoá học mắc tiền kia đâu. (Not like those expensive apps or courses.)
Thiệt hả? (Really?)
Thiệt chớ! Không có chiêu trò gì hết. (Really! No tricks.)
Chỉ là luyện nói tiếng Anh thật với thầy AI thôi. (Just practicing real English with an AI teacher.)
Ý bạn là... như thầy thật luôn hả? (You mean... like a real teacher?)
Đúng rồi! Nó sửa ngữ pháp, phát âm cho bạn (That's right! It corrects your grammar, pronunciation)
và giúp bạn nói tự tin hơn nữa. (and helps you speak more confidently.)
Được rồi! Vậy tôi tải Learna liền luôn! (Alright! Then I'll download Learna right away!)
Quá đã! Mình cùng nói tiếng Anh nha. (Awesome! Let's speak English together.)

panels.panel_visual_description: A square app icon featuring a white humanoid robot face with blue eyes is centered on a dark blue gradient background.

scenes.visual_description: The final shot is an end card displaying the app icon, download badges for app stores, and call-to-action text in Thai.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Tải ngay. Bắt đầu luyện tập. [Download now. Start practicing.]
